releases.title: v0.3.0
releases.body_md:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.3.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Features
* feat(docx-core): atomizer vs diffmatch quality benchmark (Phase 0+1) by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/25
* feat(docx-mcp): cli subcommands, range-trimmed replace_text, NVCA regression by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/29
### Bug Fixes
* fix(site): landing page overhaul, changelog data fix, CodeQL regex fix by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/21
* fix(site): trailing slashes, feedback link, Gemini CLI install by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/22
* fix(docx-mcp): eliminate flaky MRU session test by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/23
* fix(docx-mcp): capture comparison baselines on auto-opened sessions by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/24
* fix(docx-mcp)!: add token-budget pagination to read_file, remove paragraph_ids by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/26
* fix(docx-mcp): concurrent session auto-open race + grep empty-pattern guard by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/27
### Other Changes
* chore(site): update changelog data for v0.2.0 by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/20
* chore(release): bump workspace versions to 0.3.0 by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/30
* chore(release): bump mcpb manifest version to 0.3.0 by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/31


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/compare/v0.2.0...v0.3.0

releases.title: v0.2.0
releases.body_md:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v0.2.0 -->

## What's Changed
### Features
* feat(site): add changelog page and rework trust site content by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/16
* feat: site IA, function gallery, auxiliary merge generalization, and test expansion by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/17
### CI / Infrastructure
* ci: add changelog pipeline with release metadata and PR title enforcement by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/15
### Refactoring
* refactor(docx-mcp): delete duplicate_document, rename download to save, fix SKILL.md by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/18
### Other Changes
* chore(release): bump workspace to 0.2.0 by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/compare/v0.1.2...v0.2.0

releases.title: v0.1.1
releases.body_md:
## What's Changed
* fix(ci): build before lint in release preflight by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/6
* fix(ci): install site deps in release preflight by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/7
* fix(ci): preserve auth and build before npm publish by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/8
* fix(ci): force OIDC-only npm publish path by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/9
* fix(ci): run release workflow on Node 22 for trusted publishing by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/10
* fix(ci): restore registry-url in release trusted-publish workflow by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/11
* docs(readme): refocus package positioning for brownfield docx editing by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/12
* chore(release): bump package suite to 0.1.1 by @stevenobiajulu in https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/UseJunior/safe-docx/compare/v0.1.0...v0.1.1
